sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO td_audit_log ( log_id, event_type, timestamp, user_id, tenant_id, resource, action, result, ip_address, user_agent, request_id, duration, details ) VALUES ( #[logId], #[eventType], #[timestamp], #[userId], #[tenantId], #[resource], #[action], #[result], #[ipAddress], #[userAgent], #[requestId], #[duration], #[details] )
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM td_audit_log WHERE 1 = 1 #if($userId) AND user_id = #[userId] #end #if($tenantId) AND tenant_id = #[tenantId] #end #if($resource) AND resource LIKE CONCAT('%', #[resource], '%') #end #if($eventType) AND event_type = #[eventType] #end #if($result) AND result = #[result] #end ORDER BY timestamp DESC

SELECT * FROM td_audit_log WHERE 1 = 1 #if($userId) AND user_id = #[userId] #end #if($tenantId) AND tenant_id = #[tenantId] #end #if($resource) AND resource LIKE CONCAT('%', #[resource], '%') #end #if($eventType) AND event_type = #[eventType] #end #if($result) AND result = #[result] #end #if($startTime) AND timestamp >= #[startTime] #end #if($endTime) AND timestamp <= #[endTime] #end ORDER BY timestamp DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM td_audit_log WHERE 1 = 1 #if($userId) AND user_id = #[userId] #end #if($tenantId) AND tenant_id = #[tenantId] #end #if($resource) AND resource LIKE CONCAT('%', #[resource], '%') #end #if($eventType) AND event_type = #[eventType] #end #if($result) AND result = #[result] #end

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM td_audit_log WHERE 1 = 1 #if($userId) AND user_id = #[userId] #end #if($tenantId) AND tenant_id = #[tenantId] #end #if($resource) AND resource LIKE CONCAT('%', #[resource], '%') #end #if($eventType) AND event_type = #[eventType] #end #if($result) AND result = #[result] #end #if($startTime) AND timestamp >= #[startTime] #end #if($endTime) AND timestamp <= #[endTime] #end
